emails.subject: Transport 101 @ 4pm
emails.body: Transport 101 4pm Chris, If you have time today, can we go over the basics? Also, can you get a room or shall I get something on 35?

emails.subject: RE: Transport 101 @ 4pm
emails.body: RE: Transport 101 4pm Sorry Troy. I guess today is a bad day. Probably after the 1st. To: Germany, Chris

emails.subject: RE: Transport 101 @ 4pm
emails.body: That's fine. If I don't hear from you, I'll drop you a line or stop by your desk. To: Denetsosie, Troy
